content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous ICM-equipped agents can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data samples get stored into 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent long-term memory, cutting memory bloat while retaining only the most information-dense training samples that drive downstream task improvement. This creates a self-sustaining cycle where an agent’s innate curiosity shapes its own memory library for active learning, rather than relying on hand-designed active sampling heuristics.
